name: Holograph-Bridge-Protocol
description: The Holograph Bridge Protocol - solidity smart contracts
author: cxip-labs

scripts.clean-compile: yarn run clean ; yarn run compile
scripts.ganache2: source .env ; mkdir ./ganache ; rm -fr ./ganache/db2 ; mkdir ./ganache/db2 ; rm ./ganache/keys2.json ; ganache-cli --accounts=10 --defaultBalanceEther=100 --deterministic --mnemonic="$MNEMONIC" --port=9545 --hostname=0.0.0.0 --gasPrice=0 --gasLimit=10000000 --networkId=5777 --db=./ganache/db2 --acctKeys=./ganache/keys2.json
scripts.ganache-x2: source .env ; mkdir ./ganache ; rm -fr ./ganache/db ; rm -fr ./ganache/db2 ; mkdir ./ganache/db ; mkdir ./ganache/db2 ; rm ./ganache/keys.json ; rm ./ganache/keys2.json ; ganache-cli --accounts=10 --defaultBalanceEther=100 --deterministic --mnemonic="$MNEMONIC" --port=8545 --hostname=0.0.0.0 --gasPrice=0 --gasLimit=10000000 --networkId=5777 --db=./ganache/db --acctKeys=./ganache/keys.json & ganache-cli --accounts=10 --defaultBalanceEther=100 --deterministic --mnemonic="$MNEMONIC" --port=9545 --hostname=0.0.0.0 --gasPrice=0 --gasLimit=10000000 --networkId=5777 --db=./ganache/db2 --acctKeys=./ganache/keys2.json
